name: Export Patterns
summary: Common export configurations and their use cases: playtest builds, milestone releases, full production.

content.text:
## Export Patterns

Common export configurations for different use cases.

### Playtest Build

**Purpose**: Quick build for narration dry-run or internal review.

```json
{
  "output_formats": ["markdown", "html"],
  "options": {
    "include_art_plans": false,
    "include_art_renders": false,
    "include_audio_plans": false,
    "include_audio_assets": false,
    "languages": ["en"],
    "print_friendly": true
  }
}
```

**Characteristics**:
- Minimal formats (MD + HTML)
- English only
- No art/audio
- Fast turnaround

---

### Milestone Release

**Purpose**: Chapter or act completion for stakeholder review.

```json
{
  "output_formats": ["markdown", "html", "epub"],
  "options": {
    "include_art_plans": true,
    "include_art_renders": false,
    "include_audio_plans": true,
    "include_audio_assets": false,
    "languages": ["en"],
    "print_friendly": true
  }
}
```

**Characteristics**:
- Reader-friendly formats (HTML, EPUB)
- Art/audio plans for context
- Still primary language only

---

### Full Production

**Purpose**: Release-ready bundle for distribution.

```json
{
  "output_formats": ["markdown", "html", "epub", "pdf"],
  "options": {
    "include_art_plans": false,
    "include_art_renders": true,
    "include_audio_plans": false,
    "include_audio_assets": true,
    "languages": ["en", "nl", "de"],
    "print_friendly": true
  }
}
```

**Characteristics**:
- All formats including PDF
- Full renders and assets (not just plans)
- All supported languages
- Print-ready layout

---

### Translation Review

**Purpose**: Review translation coverage before release.

```json
{
  "output_formats": ["markdown", "html"],
  "options": {
    "include_art_plans": false,
    "include_art_renders": false,
    "include_audio_plans": false,
    "include_audio_assets": false,
    "languages": ["en", "nl"],
    "print_friendly": false
  }
}
```

**Characteristics**:
- Side-by-side language comparison
- Text-focused (no assets)
- Coverage flags visible

---

### Format Notes

| Format | Best For | Limitations |
|--------|----------|-------------|
| markdown | Source control, diffing | No rich styling |
| html | Web reading, interactivity | Requires server/hosting |
| epub | E-readers, mobile | Limited interactivity |
| pdf | Print, archival | Static, large files |
